summary: Build job reported status=completed and SSE emitted a `complete` frame, but the served application at /apps/<slug>/ is the UNTOUCHED Ekoa scaffold placeholder, not the requested Fernando Pessoa quote app.

evidence.request: Uma página simples que mostra uma citação aleatória de Fernando Pessoa a cada clique num botão. Sem backend.
evidence.buildCommit: 1c6da6b added ONLY: pessoa.html (128 lines, the real app), .claude.json, agent session jsonl. It did NOT modify frontend/src/App.jsx, frontend/src/index.jsx, or rebuild dist/.
evidence.bundleJsContent: 0 occurrences of 'Fernando Pessoa'/'Pessoa'; 9 occurrences of scaffold copy; scaffold-root/scaffold-title CSS classes present
evidence.appScaffoldCopy: "Let's build something that will change" / "Your app is being created right now. Watch it come to life." / "Powered by Ekoa"
evidence.orphanedRealApp: pessoa.html at project root IS the correct app (title 'Citações de Fernando Pessoa', dark theme, quote + button), but it is NOT the served entrypoint and is not reachable at /apps/<slug>/

impact: The operator's priority journey (build -> served app) produces a served bundle that does not fulfil the request while the job claims success. The real work landed in an un-served standalone HTML file and dist/ was never rebuilt.
